events.content: Preserve caller cancellation only for forced outbox flushes: Preserve caller cancellation only for forced outbox flushes

raw.question: Preserve caller cancellation only for forced outbox flushes
raw.chosen: Preserve caller cancellation only for forced outbox flushes
raw.reasoning: Normal sync-cycle flushes need the new root-derived deadline; FlushOutboxOnce uses forceDue and its caller ctx is the command budget, so composing parent cancellation there fixes the reviewer finding without reintroducing per-cycle timeout starvation.

events.content: Synchronously cancel forced outbox context when parent is already done: Synchronously cancel forced outbox context when parent is already done

raw.question: Synchronously cancel forced outbox context when parent is already done
raw.chosen: Synchronously cancel forced outbox context when parent is already done
raw.reasoning: context.AfterFunc runs cancellation asynchronously for an already-canceled parent; without an immediate parent.Err check, FlushOutboxOnce can upload before observing the command cancellation.
